tasks.subject: Task 1: Add ignoreHTTPSErrors to Camoufox and Chromium contexts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bypass HTTPS certificate errors at the browser context level for both Camoufox/Firefox and Chromium fallback paths in crawler-service.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/functions.ts:486-497` (Camoufox path)
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/functions.ts:518-524` (Chromium fallback)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] Camoufox `launchOptions` contains `ignoreHTTPSErrors: true`
- [x] Chromium `preLaunchHooks` sets `launchContext.launchOptions.ignoreHTTPSErrors = true`
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with no new errors
- [x] `npm run build` succeeds
- [x] Changes committed with bilingual message (b7a04979)

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build`

**Completion:** Commit b7a04979. Chromium path needed `as any` type assertion because Crawlee's LaunchOptions type doesn't expose the intersection with launchPersistentContext options, but it works at runtime (Crawlee itself uses this pattern internally at browser-crawler.js:407).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/functions.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Camoufox launchOptions contains ignoreHTTPSErrors: true", "Chromium preLaunchHooks sets ignoreHTTPSErrors = true", "TypeScript compiles", "Build succeeds", "Committed with bilingual message"], "commitSha": "b7a04979"}
```
